atomicity.message: Staged payload defines only the IFR2-C1 ownership input schema, parser, validation, and result status contract for later payload accounting.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed lint-rules for the two-file C1 ownership schema payload.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json confirmed only ownership.go and ownership_test.go in hash sha256:8cf10f63c90dc66bd42cb84a5306fe147673b99f1e5ab92f4195d6c94cf925a3.
git diff --cached --check, focused internal tests, and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed dry implementation structure for the C1 schema package.
evidence: Validation is factored through ValidateOwnershipInput, validateOwnershipRecord, NormalizeOwnershipPath, enum validators, needsOwnershipRationale, decodeStrict, and ownershipClaimKeyFor.
Tests exercise the helpers rather than duplicating parser logic.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed anti-reward-hacking for the C1-only schema contract.
evidence: The staged payload defines data structures, strict parser, validation, path normalization, rationale rules, source preservation, and merge helper only.
No CLI wiring, Beads inference, git classification command, durable ownership config, or filesystem mutation is introduced.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed direct test coverage for ownership schema/parser validation.
evidence: ownership_test.go covers missing fields, invalid enums, accepted structured expiration scopes, rationale requirements, path normalization/rejection, source preservation, stdin override, and status contract.
Focused internal tests and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed definition-of-done for the C1 payload.
evidence: The staged payload hash includes exactly internal/backpressure/ownership.go and internal/backpressure/ownership_test.go.
Clean staged-copy tests passed: focused internal ownership/schema test command and full go test ./...; git diff --cached --check passed.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed evidence-log for packet 3295 and reproduced the hash.
evidence: Packet 3295 names response path log/backpressure/responses/8cf10f63c90dc66bd42cb84a5306fe147673b99f1e5ab92f4195d6c94cf925a3.json.
ScarletMarsh recorded hash reproduction, diff check, focused internal tests, and full tests.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed scope-control for the C1 staged payload.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status output exactly the two ownership files.
Unstaged peer/local dirt was not included in the staged hash; C1 respects non-goals for command integration and Beads enrichment.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed destructive-operations for in-memory schema/parser code.
evidence: The staged code reads from io.Reader, parses JSON, normalizes paths, validates records, and merges in memory.
No file writes/removes, command execution, network calls, or external state mutation were found.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed data-integrity for the explicit round-1 ownership contract.
evidence: ownership.go has strict decode, required-field validation, ownership_kind and expires_or_scope enum validation, path safety, rationale requirements, status constants, source-preserving records, and same-claim merge helper.
ownership_test.go covers required fields, enum acceptance/rejection, rationale rules, path normalization/rejection, audit source preservation, stdin precedence, and status contract.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed security-boundaries for local in-memory ownership validation.
evidence: The package reads JSON from an io.Reader and returns structs/errors; it does not execute commands or write/delete files.
NormalizeOwnershipPath rejects absolute paths and traversal, with tests covering Unix and backslash traversal examples.

conditions.message: No visual surface is changed by this internal Go schema/parser payload.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status lists only internal/backpressure/ownership.go and internal/backpressure/ownership_test.go.
No browser UI, terminal TUI rendering, screenshots, CSS/layout, demo assets, canvas, or generated visual artifact surface is staged.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed performance-budget for the small in-memory parser/validator.
evidence: The parser reads input once, decodes JSON strictly, iterates record slices for validation, and uses an in-memory map for merge.
No repo walking, subprocesses, network calls, background work, or performance-sensitive runtime path is introduced; go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed autonomy-boundary for the C1-only internal schema package.
evidence: The staged payload has no cmd/burpvalve, hook, config, docs, Beads, reservation, or git-index integration.
ParseOwnershipInput, ValidateOwnershipInput, and MergeOwnershipInputs are in-memory helpers only and introduce no autonomous external action.
